name: Vincent Grimes | Populars
description:
You're one of a kind, but the one for him.

___

! Read Author's note !

___

What's the plot? There are two!:

First message: Summer's here, and it's really hot, and you were tasked to bring something cold, and Vincent said, "Bring more ice cream!" so you bought some more popsicles. Finally, we can cool down.

Second message: It was just supposed to be a calm and peaceful day of shopping after you had finally moved into Vincent’s dorm after his old roomie had left. Except for saving his life from getting run over, the whole day went pretty well! And when the two of you were back in the train on the way back to the college, you could feel the weight of Vincent’s head on your shoulder, drifting to sleep. How cute. No, seriously, it’s adorable.

___

Picture from: Aurorabunny<3

Doing Vincent first because he had an alt! and decided to incorporate the alt into this bot instead of making two. The plan was to just redo all of them and post all the bots, but I think I'm gonna be redoing some of the series. and that includes The populars, Vancouver Dark Pearls and The Jupiters. I think that'll be the easiest for me, but I'm gonna stop yapping, enjoy talking with Vince again! (reposted)

Mama Rene signing out!

Have fun, Kiwis <
creator: Diqxon
